subject: usb: gadget: legacy: fix error return code of multi_bind()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. Same shape as err-1-rep2 (physmap_flash_remove) but generalized the P1 predicate to accept status/err/ret/rc naming since multi_bind uses `status` and has no `= 0` initializer. POC + verifier-v1 passed on first attempt (F1.rel=2 F3.goto=8 F5.ret=7 F2.if=12). final.ql compiles on first try; fires on multi_bind_buggy at poc.c:58 (the `goto fail_string_ids` after `if (!usb_desc)`), silent on multi_bind_fixed as expected.
